data.text: P03/03 FELISIAN. LANDING AT 256.0 WAS ON A BRIGHTLY FORESTED DOWN
HILL SLOPE WHERE NEAR THE WATER, A POINTED SHAPE WAS SEEN. THIS
TURNED OUT TO BE A MULTIFACETED OUTCROPPING OF UNUSUAL COLORING-
AT LEAST WHEN VISITED- AND SHAPE. WAS INTERRUPTED BY A HOPPER
DURING INVESTIGATION, WHICH CONTINUED WITH RETURN TO CAPSULE, AT
WHICH TIME IT WAS JOINED BY A SMALLER MORE ACTIVE HOPPER. AT
287.1 IT WAS ROLLING, COL BARREN GROUND WITH A SMALL LAKE NEARBY.
AT 167.91 HILLY AND BARREN GROUND DOMINATED BY A LARGE GORGE-LIKE
CANYON AND ASSOCIATED DEEP DEPRESSION. CORRECTION TO FIRST COORD:
